errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Anthropic Sonnet rate limit hit during scheduled run; job failed to execute and write health data.
errors.suggestedFix: Reduce concurrent Anthropic cron job density or switch this job to a non-Anthropic model (e.g. Codex/gpt-4o).

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Paperclip watchdog failed 4 consecutive times due to Anthropic rate limiting; Paperclip alerts may be delayed.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch paperclip-activity-feed to a non-Anthropic model or stagger its 30-min cadence to avoid peak load windows.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Gmail-to-calendar sync failed 5 consecutive times; calendar events from recent emails may be missing.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch gmail-calendar-sync to a non-Anthropic model (Sonnet is over-allocated); this job is low-complexity and works on Haiku or gpt-4o-mini.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Context usage monitor failed 3 consecutive times; session context overflow warnings are not being generated.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch to Haiku or gpt-4o-mini — this job only calls session_status and sends a Slack message, no heavy reasoning needed.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Control tower JSON not updated this cycle; dashboard may show stale telemetry.
errors.suggestedFix: Stagger this job's 2-hour cadence anchor by 30 min to avoid collision with other hourly Anthropic jobs.

errors.meaning: Version check ran successfully and found openclaw update (2026.3.13 → 2026.3.22), but failed to post to #infrastructure because the channel target was not found.
errors.suggestedFix: Verify Slack channel ID C0ANLFZD1TJ is correct and the bot is a member; update delivery.to in job config if the channel was renamed.

errors.meaning: Weekly Toggl summary ran and generated report but failed to deliver because the delivery target format is invalid.
errors.suggestedFix: Update toggl-weekly-summary delivery config: change 'to' field from 'c0amwt9jb5y' to 'channel:C0AMWT9JB5Y' (requires channel: prefix).

errors.meaning: Cron job failed with 1 consecutive errors
errors.suggestedFix: Check cron job logs for details
